name: vap-agent-image,-video-&-music-generation
description:
VAP is an MCP server for AI media generation with cost control. Generate images&Editing (Flux2 Pro), videos (Veo 3.1), and music (Suno V5) with deterministic pricing.

Features:
 Pre-commit pricing – Know exact cost before execution
 Budget enforcement – Reserve → Burn → Refund model
 Deterministic retry behavior – No runaway costs
 Production-ready outputs – Normalized to broadcast standards

https://vapagent.com
